intro: This is what the team is working on next, in priority order. Each item shows a priority score — higher means more worth doing now for the effort it takes. Betting work sits at the bottom and is tagged research-only: it is an experiment we measure, never the main product and never the top of the list.

items.title: Value every possession on this season's games
items.one_liner: Extend the possession-value engine to this year's games and grade it for the first time.

items.title: Match each prediction range to the game's uncertainty
items.one_liner: Make the range wider for genuinely uncertain games and tighter for the clear ones.

items.title: Get a sharper closing-line benchmark
items.one_liner: Probe a free source for a professional-grade closing line to upgrade every market comparison.

items.title: Rank each night's best bets by confidence
items.one_liner: Combine where we disagree with the market and our track record per game type into a tiered pick list.

items.title: Add a weekly market scorecard
items.one_liner: A short weekly line showing where we beat the market that week.

floor.label: 5 things are lined up — running a little short (we aim to keep at least 40 ready).
